← All NHC examples

NHC1 — Puppeteer HPH R1, Sailwave SWNHC2015 verification (n=14)

Scoring system: NHC1    α (blend factor): — 
Howth YC One Designs Series 1, Tuesday 5 May 2026, Puppeteer HPH fleet.
Start 19:15:00. 14 finishers. Source: Sailwave's published NHC1 output for
this fleet (helm names anonymised; the original export is no longer kept in
the repo).

Every NewRating below is the value Sailwave published — independent
verification that the SWNHC2015 implementation reproduces Sailwave to 3 dp.
See docs/notes/sailwave/nhc1-reverse-engineering.md for the algorithm and
reference/data/2026-hyc-club-racing/sailwave-nhc1-reverse.py for the
Python reference (nr_swnhc2015_full).

Five boats are extreme under SWNHC2015's S = Q/L classification with
asymmetric thresholds (sHi = μ + 1.5σ, sLo = μ − 1.0σ):
  fast (S > sHi):  Harlequin, Ibis
  slow (S < sLo):  Geppetto, Mojo, Yelllow Peril
(The §9 "SLOW" set of three boats in the reverse-engineering note was
produced by an earlier candidate algorithm — Family-B with a one-sided
T_C-based cap — not the final SWNHC2015 algorithm.)
Sailwave-published NewRating values — verify SWNHC2015 to 3 dp.

Race 1

Gun time: 19:15:00   Finishers: 14   CTavg: 47m 29s   mean(TCF): 1.2904
μ(S): 0.9967   σ(S): 0.1053   extreme if S > 1.1546 or < 0.8915 (5)   P50: 0.468325   W51: 0.472996   Z51: 0.994873
